fee_note: Portfolio CAGR uses daily |dw| fees 0.15%/0.25%. Per-trade: gross=price only; net=gross-0.40% RT.

definitions.gross_ret: Stock price return only (no fee): exit/entry - 1
definitions.net_ret: gross_ret - 0.40% (0.15% buy + 0.25% sell). After fees at stock RT level.
definitions.weight: Average portfolio weight while this name was held
definitions.cagr_after: Strategy running CAGR from 2012-01-01 through trade exit date (portfolio, all fees).
definitions.cagr_change: cagr_after - cagr_before (pp): how running portfolio CAGR moved across this trade window
